page.title: PaletteSpin - Create color palettes with a playful spin
page.description: PaletteSpin helps you explore color combinations, save your favorite palettes, and adjust colors in a simple, playful way.
hero.eyebrow: A playful way to explore colors.
hero.title: PaletteSpin
hero.lead: PaletteSpin helps you create and adjust color palettes with a simple, playful flow. Explore combinations, compare looks, save ideas, and shape a palette that fits your mood, design, or creative project.
hero.note: This page is provided as the official marketing page for PaletteSpin. App availability may vary by region and review status.
features.title: What PaletteSpin helps you do
features.lead: PaletteSpin is designed for quick color exploration. It keeps the workflow light so you can try ideas without getting stuck in complicated settings.
features.card.explore.title: Explore color combinations
features.card.explore.body: Try different color groups and discover combinations that feel useful for wallpapers, icons, layouts, mood boards, and visual experiments.
features.card.adjust.title: Adjust the look
features.card.adjust.body: Fine-tune colors and presentation options so the palette feels closer to the image or mood you want to create.
features.card.save.title: Save ideas for later
features.card.save.body: Keep palettes and settings you like so you can come back to them when you want to continue working on an idea.
features.card.start.title: Use it as a creative starting point
features.card.start.body: PaletteSpin is useful when you want a small spark before creating an image, choosing a theme, or deciding the direction of a design.
about.title: Built for lightweight creative decisions
about.lead: Choosing colors can become surprisingly slow when there are too many options. PaletteSpin focuses on making that first step easier: try, compare, adjust, and keep the ideas that feel right.
about.useful.title: Useful for
about.useful.item.project: Finding a color direction for a small project
about.useful.item.wallpaper: Creating palette ideas for wallpapers or visuals
about.useful.item.compare: Comparing different moods before committing to one
about.useful.item.save: Saving color ideas for later reference
about.simple.title: Simple by design
about.simple.item.account: No account is required for the core local workflow
about.simple.item.focus: The app is focused on color exploration and adjustment
about.simple.item.support: Support and privacy information are available from this page
about.simple.item.change: Features may change as the app improves over time
about.note.title: A small note before you use it.
about.note.body: PaletteSpin helps with creative color exploration, but final color appearance may vary depending on your device display, brightness, export format, and the apps or services where you use the colors.
cta.title: Start with a spin. Keep the colors that feel right.
cta.body: PaletteSpin gives you a lightweight way to explore palettes, adjust visuals, and save creative ideas without overcomplicating the process.
